name: fitfileviewer
description: Fit File Viewer is a cross-platform application for parsing, visualizing, and analyzing .fit files using charts, maps, tables, and other data visualization tools for Garmin and fitness activities.
author: Nick2bad4u <20943337+Nick2bad4u@users.noreply.github.com> (https://nick2bad4u.github.io/FitFileViewer)

scripts.lint: npm run lint:secretlint && npm run lint:root && npm run lint:app && npm run lint:docusaurus && npm run lint:remark
scripts.lint:app: node scripts/run-eslint.mjs app && npm run typecheck
scripts.lint:app:fix: node scripts/run-eslint.mjs app --fix && npm run typecheck
scripts.lint:docusaurus: node scripts/run-eslint.mjs docusaurus && npm run lint:docusaurus:content
scripts.lint:docusaurus:fix: node scripts/run-eslint.mjs docusaurus --fix && npm run lint:docusaurus:content
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:root:fix && npm run lint:app:fix && npm run lint:docusaurus:fix
scripts.package:signed: npm run release:check-signing:required && cross-env REQUIRE_CODE_SIGNING=true node scripts/build-package.mjs --dir
scripts.package:unsigned: cross-env FFV_FORCE_UNSIGNED_PACKAGE=true CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false REQUIRE_CODE_SIGNING=false node scripts/build-package.mjs --dir
scripts.perf:baseline: npm run prepare:electron && npm run build:runtime-ts && node scripts/run-performance-baseline.mjs --sample-count 3
scripts.perf:compare: npm run prepare:electron && npm run build:runtime-ts && node scripts/run-performance-baseline.mjs --sample-count 3 --compare artifacts/performance-baseline.previous.json --output artifacts/performance-baseline.current.json
scripts.perf:trend: npm run prepare:electron && npm run build:runtime-ts && node scripts/run-performance-baseline.mjs --sample-count 3 --compare-if-exists artifacts/performance-baseline.previous.json --output artifacts/performance-baseline-cache/performance-baseline.json
scripts.prettier: prettier package.json docusaurus/package.json docusaurus/docusaurus.config.ts docusaurus/sidebars.ts docusaurus/tsconfig.json typedoc.json .markdown-link-check.json .markdownlint.json .ncurc.json .pre-commit-config.yaml .secretlintrc.cjs cliff.toml codecov.yml cspell.json electron-builder.config.cjs flatpak-build.yml mermaid.config.json prettier.config.mjs stylelint.config.mjs .remarkrc.mjs eslint.config.mjs playwright.config.ts vite.renderer.config.mjs vitest.config.ts tsconfig.eslint.json tsconfig.app.base.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.runtime.json tsconfig.docusaurus.json tsconfig.vitest-typecheck.json tsconfig.app.eslint.json "*.yml" "*.yaml" ".github/*.yml" ".github/workflows/*.yml" "scripts/*.mjs" "tests/fixtures/**/*.{js,ts}" "tests/integration/**/*.ts" "tests/unit/**/*.ts" "tests/playwright/**/*.ts" "tests/vitest/**/*.{cjs,mjs,ts}" electron-app/renderer/leafletMeasureLite.js electron-app/renderer/leafletMeasureLiteRuntime.js --log-level warn --cache --cache-location=.cache/.prettier-cache --cache-strategy=content --check
scripts.prettier:fix: prettier package.json docusaurus/package.json docusaurus/docusaurus.config.ts docusaurus/sidebars.ts docusaurus/tsconfig.json typedoc.json .markdown-link-check.json .markdownlint.json .ncurc.json .pre-commit-config.yaml .secretlintrc.cjs cliff.toml codecov.yml cspell.json electron-builder.config.cjs flatpak-build.yml mermaid.config.json prettier.config.mjs stylelint.config.mjs .remarkrc.mjs eslint.config.mjs playwright.config.ts vite.renderer.config.mjs vitest.config.ts tsconfig.eslint.json tsconfig.app.base.json tsconfig.app.json tsconfig.runtime.json tsconfig.docusaurus.json tsconfig.vitest-typecheck.json tsconfig.app.eslint.json "*.yml" "*.yaml" ".github/*.yml" ".github/workflows/*.yml" "scripts/*.mjs" "tests/fixtures/**/*.{js,ts}" "tests/integration/**/*.ts" "tests/unit/**/*.ts" "tests/playwright/**/*.ts" "tests/vitest/**/*.{cjs,mjs,ts}" electron-app/renderer/leafletMeasureLite.js electron-app/renderer/leafletMeasureLiteRuntime.js --log-level warn --cache --cache-location=.cache/.prettier-cache --cache-strategy=content --write
scripts.pretest: npm run prepare:electron && npm run build:runtime-ts
scripts.test:coverage:codecov: npm run build:runtime-ts && node --max-old-space-size=8192 ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs --config vitest.config.ts --coverage --run --reporter=dot --silent --maxWorkers 1 --coverage.include electron-app/preload/mainStateBridge.ts --coverage.include electron-app/utils/files/export/createExportGPXButton.ts --coverage.include electron-app/utils/files/import/openFileSelector.ts --coverage.include electron-app/utils/files/import/sendFitFileToAltFitReader.ts --coverage.include electron-app/utils/maps/controls/mapActionButtons.ts --coverage.include electron-app/utils/maps/controls/mapLapSelector.ts --coverage.include electron-app/utils/maps/controls/mapMeasureTool.ts --coverage.include electron-app/utils/theming/core/theme.ts --coverage.thresholds.lines 0 --coverage.thresholds.functions 0 --coverage.thresholds.branches 0 --coverage.thresholds.statements 0 tests/unit/preload.mainStateBridge.test.ts tests/unit/utils/files/export/createExportGPXButton.test.ts tests/unit/utils/files/import/openFileSelector.test.ts tests/unit/utils/files/import/sendFitFileToAltFitReader.test.ts tests/unit/maps/controls/mapActionButtons.test.ts tests/unit/maps/controls/mapLapSelector.test.ts tests/unit/maps/controls/mapMeasureTool.test.ts tests/unit/utils/theming/core/theme.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:runtime-ts && node --max-old-space-size=8192 ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs --config vitest.config.ts --run tests/integration --maxWorkers 1
scripts.test:playwright: npm run build:runtime-ts && cross-env PW_DISABLE_TS_ESM=1 playwright test tests/playwright/app-ui.spec.ts --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:tabs: npm run build:runtime-ts && node --max-old-space-size=8192 ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs --config vitest.config.ts --run --reporter=verbose tests/unit/tabs --maxWorkers 1
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:runtime-ts && node --max-old-space-size=8192 ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs --config vitest.config.ts --run tests/unit --maxWorkers 1
scripts.update-deps: npx ncu -i --install never && npm update --force && npm install --force && npm run sync:node-version-files
scripts.verify:fast: npm run sync:node-version-files:check && npm run prettier && npm run lint && npm run lint:css && npm run docs:typecheck && npm test
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify:fast && npm run docs:build && npm run audit && npm run test:playwright && npm run release:check-signing && npm run package:unsigned && npm run test:packaged
scripts.verify:release:signed: npm run verify:fast && npm run docs:build && npm run audit && npm run test:playwright && npm run package:signed && cross-env REQUIRE_CODE_SIGNING=true npm run release:verify-signing-artifacts && npm run test:packaged
